description_long: This house features a simple, rectangular structure with a gable roof covered in blue shingles and a smaller, intersecting wooden section. The exterior walls are finished in a muted tan color, accented by wooden beams at the corners and around the windows. Multiple arched windows line the longer sides, providing ample natural light, while the main entrance is marked by a wooden door beneath a small overhang. The house sits on a patch of earth with scattered tufts of grass and is surrounded by several wooden crates and barrels, suggesting a rustic or semi-rural urban setting. The roof overhangs provide some shelter at the entry points, and the overall design is functional and unadorned. The structure appears to be a single-story dwelling, typical of a ranch or cottage style.
description: A single-story tan house with a blue gable roof, arched windows, and wooden accents, surrounded by crates and grass. The design is simple and rustic, with a prominent entryway and intersecting roof sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a wooden door, arched windows, and crates stacked near the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the secondary entrance, more crates, and a clear view of the intersecting roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back wall with arched windows and the overhanging blue roof.
description_view_3: Straight rear view showing a long row of arched windows and the uninterrupted blue roofline.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a wooden door under a small overhang, flanked by crates and simple wooden trim.
